infoParagraph1: cyDetails about the defendant’s income and expenses can be used by a judge to reach a decision on their case, and also to decide how much they could afford to repay if they have rent arrears.
infoParagraph2: cyProviding details about the defendant’s income and expenses is optional.
infoParagraph3: cyThe claimant will be able to see the defendant’s answers.
question: cyDoes the defendant want to provide details of their income and expenses?

errors.provideFinanceDetails: cySelect if the defendant wants to provide details of their income and expenses
